purpose: Define user tiers for testing whether SocratexPipeline generalizes beyond its author.

personas.label: Power user / maintainer
personas.success_signal: The pipeline lets an advanced user run ambitious work without losing priority, closure, or reusable lessons.

personas.label: Moderately technical daily user
personas.success_signal: The pipeline helps a technical non-author use Codex productively without designing the process himself.

personas.label: Basic daily user
validates: whether advanced workflow discipline stays hidden until useful
personas.success_signal: The pipeline improves continuity and follow-up without requiring the user to understand the whole system.
